effect.content: Individual results and experiences may vary. [Name] is an actual patient taking IBSRELA and has been compensated for discussing her experience.

rule_text: Patient-story modules must carry the disclosure "Individual results and experiences may vary. [Name] is an actual patient taking IBSRELA and has been compensated for discussing her experience." immediately under the story copy.
intent: Ensure required verbatim patient-story compensation/results disclosure.
summary: Patient-story modules require disclosure under story copy: "Individual results may vary. [Name] is an actual compensated IBSRELA patient discussing her experience.
